title: Incubation Period
script_summary: Unravel the science behind the incubation period and its implications.

segments.voiceover: Science reveals the hidden truth about the incubation period.
The incubation period is the time between exposure to a pathogen and the onset of symptoms.
This can vary widely—days, weeks, even months—based on the disease.
For example, the flu can show symptoms in just one to four days, while COVID-19 might take up to 14 days.
Understanding this helps in early detection and containment of diseases.
Curious about more scientific insights? Follow for more!
